elementary.title: A2 Present simple vs present continuous
elementary.content:
📌 So sánh chi tiết
Present SimplePresent Continuous
Dùng khi nàoThói quen, sự thật chung, lịch trình cố địnhĐang xảy ra lúc nói, hành động tạm thời, kế hoạch gần
Dấu hiệualways, usually, often, sometimes, never, every day, once a weeknow, right now, at the moment, these days, this week
Công thứcS + V / V+s/esS + am/is/are + V-ing
Ví dụI wash my hair every day.I'm brushing my teeth now.
⚠️ Stative Verbs – Động từ trạng thái
Các động từ này KHÔNG dùng ở thì tiếp diễn (Continuous), ngay cả khi hành động đang xảy ra:
• Cảm xúc: like, love, hate, want, need, prefer
• Suy nghĩ: know, believe, understand, remember, mean
• Giác quan: see, hear, smell, taste, feel
• Sở hữu: have (sở hữu), belong, own, cost, seem
❌ I am knowing the answer. → ✅ I know the answer.

exercises.q: He is an architect, but he ___ at the moment.
exercises.opts: is not working,does not work,not works,not working

exercises.q: I ___ sports magazines. I think they are boring.
___ you often ___ TV in the afternoon?
Listen! The teacher ___ to the class.
I usually ___ to work, but this week I ___.
exercises.opts: drive / walk,drive / walking,drive / am walking,am driving / walk

exercises.q: You can turn off the TV. I ___ it.
exercises.opts: don't watch,am not watching,not watch,am not watch

exercises.q: I am hungry. I ___ to eat something.
What time ___ she ___ work on Fridays?

exercises.opts: not like,am not liking,don't like,doesn't like

exercises.q: They ___ a new house these days.
I ___ (write) a letter at the moment.
I ___ (need) some help with my homework.

reorder.words: I am washing my hair now
She studies English every day
They are playing football at the moment
Does he work on Sundays ?
I don't like spicy food
What are you doing right now ?
The train leaves at nine PM
We are staying with friends this week
My mother cooks dinner every evening
Listen ! Someone is playing the piano
I prefer coffee to tea
It doesn't rain very often here
Are you wearing a coat today ?
Water boils at one hundred degrees
I am not watching TV now
He usually gets up at seven
The sun rises in the East
What time does she start work ?
They are building a new house
I need some help with this

passage.text: Dear Laura, I {{1}} (write) from Spain. I {{2}} (sit) by the sea. I {{3}} (need) a change. They {{4}} (need) speakers. I {{5}} (help) people. I {{6}} (learn) the job. I {{7}} (love) it. I {{8}} (get) no weekends. Someone {{9}} (come) now. I {{10}} (hope) you are well.

Usually I {{1}} (get up) late. Today I {{2}} (get up) early. My dad {{3}} (cook) now. I {{4}} (smell) coffee. We {{5}} (not/have) big meals usually. Today we {{6}} (have) cake. My dog {{7}} (play) outside. He {{8}} (usually/sleep). We {{9}} (enjoy) the sun. It {{10}} (be) nice.

Sarah {{1}} (be) a nurse. She {{2}} (work) at hospital. She {{3}} (usually/start) at 8. This week she {{4}} (work) nights. Now she {{5}} (sleep). Mark {{6}} (be) her husband. He {{7}} (not/work) today. He {{8}} (make) lunch. Kids {{9}} (play). Everyone {{10}} (seem) happy.

Look! He {{1}} (run). I {{2}} (think) he {{3}} (catch) the bus. It {{4}} (usually/stop) here. Today it {{5}} (not/stop). I {{6}} (not/know) why. The driver {{7}} (be) in a hurry. He {{8}} (shout) now. He {{9}} (look) angry. I {{10}} (hope) he is okay.

I {{1}} (be) at airport. I {{2}} (wait) for flight. Plane {{3}} (usually/arrive) early. Today it {{4}} (be) late. People {{5}} (sit) on floor. Some {{6}} (read), others {{7}} (sleep). I {{8}} (not/like) waiting. I {{9}} (want) to leave. Friend {{10}} (wait) for me.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả chi tiết về công việc hiện tại của bạn (bạn làm nghề gì, đang làm dự án nào, đồng nghiệp ra sao và cảm nhận của bạn về công việc đó).
writing_prompts.example: Currently, I am working as a software developer at a tech company in the city center. I am collaborating with a talented team to build a new mobile application for education. Every day, we are discussing new features and fixing bugs to ensure the best user experience.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một sở thích mà bạn thường làm mỗi ngày (tại sao bạn thích nó, bạn thường làm khi nào, ở đâu và nó giúp ích gì cho bạn).
writing_prompts.example: I usually spend my free time reading books and listening to music because it helps me relax after a long day. I often go to the local library on weekends to find new novels. I believe that reading is the best way to expand my knowledge and improve my vocabulary.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả chi tiết về thời tiết ngày hôm nay (trời nắng hay mưa, nhiệt độ thế nào, mọi người xung quanh đang làm gì và bạn cảm thấy thế nào về thời tiết này).
writing_prompts.example: The weather today is absolutely beautiful and the sun is shining brightly across the clear blue sky. A gentle breeze is blowing through the trees, making it a perfect day for outdoor activities. Many people are walking in the park and enjoying the fresh air right now.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về các hoạt động bạn thường làm vào buổi sáng từ lúc thức dậy cho đến khi bắt đầu làm việc hoặc đi học (thời gian, các bước thực hiện và thói quen ăn uống).
writing_prompts.example: Every morning, I wake up at 6 AM and start my day with some light exercise and meditation. After that, I brush my teeth, take a quick shower, and prepare a healthy breakfast for my family. I usually drink a cup of hot coffee while reading the morning news before going to work.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về những dự định hoặc kế hoạch cụ thể mà bạn đang thực hiện trong tuần này (bạn đi đâu, gặp ai, đang học thêm gì và mục tiêu của tuần này là gì).
writing_prompts.example: This week, I am staying with my aunt in the countryside to help her with the garden and enjoy some quiet time. We are planning to visit the local market tomorrow morning to buy some fresh vegetables. I am also taking some online courses to improve my English skills during this trip.

elementary.title: A2 Present perfect: Form and use
elementary.content:
📐 Công thức
Khẳng định: S + have/has + V3/ed
Phủ định: S + haven't/hasn't + V3/ed
Câu hỏi: Have/Has + S + V3/ed?
📌 Cách dùng chính
• Sự việc vừa mới xảy ra: I've just seen Peter.
• Kinh nghiệm sống: Have you ever been to India?
• Sự việc bắt đầu trong quá khứ và còn tiếp diễn: They have been married for 25 years.
🔑 Từ nhận biết
• Just: Vừa mới (dùng trong câu khẳng định).
• Yet: Chưa (dùng trong câu phủ định và nghi vấn, đứng cuối câu).
• Already: Rồi (dùng trong câu khẳng định).
• Ever/Never: Đã từng / Chưa từng.
• For + khoảng thời gian: for 2 years.
• Since + mốc thời gian: since 2010.

exercises.q: Where is Jane? She's ___ to shop.

reorder.words: I have seen that movie before
Have you ever been to Paris ?
She has already finished her homework
We haven't met him yet
They have lived here for ten years
Has he called you today ?
I have just lost my keys
We have been friends since childhood
She hasn't seen him lately
Have they finished the project yet ?
I have never eaten sushi
He has worked here since May
We have already bought the tickets
Has it stopped raining yet ?
I have just finished my lunch
They haven't arrived at the station
Have you seen my glasses ?
She has been to Italy twice
We haven't heard from him
I have already done my laundry

passage.text: I {{1}} (have) this car for years. We {{2}} (know) since school. I {{3}} (not/eat) since morning. She {{4}} (not/sleep) for two days. I {{5}} (want) to be writer. We {{6}} (be) together for ten years. I {{7}} (not/see) John. It {{8}} (not/rain) for long. My life {{9}} (be) exciting. I {{10}} (travel) a lot.

My friend {{1}} (live) in London for five years. We {{2}} (not/see) each other since last year. I {{3}} (just/send) an email. He {{4}} (not/reply) yet. I {{5}} (always/want) to visit. Where {{6}} (be) Tom? He {{7}} (go) to library. He {{8}} (be) there for hours. I {{9}} (not/finish) yet. I {{10}} (work) hard.

I {{1}} (live) here for ten years. I {{2}} (see) changes. They {{3}} (build) a mall. I {{4}} (be) there twice. I {{5}} (not/buy) anything. Sister {{6}} (just/start) job. She {{7}} (be) busy. We {{8}} (not/have) dinner. She {{9}} (already/work) hard. She {{10}} (never/be) tired.

A: {{1}} you {{2}} (see) keys? B: No, I {{3}} (not/see). {{4}} you {{5}} (look) in kitchen? A: Yes, I {{6}} (already/look). B: Maybe you {{7}} (leave) them in car. A: I {{8}} (just/check). B: I {{9}} (be) in garden. A: I {{10}} (not/check) garden yet.

I {{1}} (lose) my bag. I {{2}} (look) everywhere. I {{3}} (not/find) it yet. I {{4}} (go) to station. They {{5}} (ask) questions. I {{6}} (be) worried. Someone {{7}} (just/call). They {{8}} (find) it. I {{9}} (be) happy. I {{10}} (not/be) lucky for long.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một chuyến du lịch đáng nhớ của bạn (bạn đã đi đâu, đi bao nhiêu lần, bạn đã trải nghiệm những gì về văn hóa và ẩm thực ở đó).
writing_prompts.example: I have visited many beautiful places in my life, but Japan is definitely my favorite destination so far. I have been to Tokyo and Kyoto twice, and I have experienced the amazing culture and delicious food there. I have always wanted to go back and explore more of the countryside.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một công việc hoặc dự án mà bạn vừa mới hoàn thành xong (bạn đã làm nó trong bao lâu, cảm giác của bạn khi xong việc và bước tiếp theo là gì).
writing_prompts.example: I have just finished my final project for the advanced English course after working on it for three weeks. I have put a lot of effort into researching and writing the report, and I feel very relieved now. I have already sent the document to my teacher and I am waiting for the feedback.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một người bạn mà bạn đã quen biết từ lâu (quen nhau từ khi nào, ở đâu, hai bạn đã cùng nhau trải qua những gì và mối quan hệ hiện tại ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: I have known my best friend, Nam, since we were in primary school together in our hometown. We have shared many wonderful memories and supported each other through difficult times for over fifteen years. Even though we live in different cities now, we have always kept in touch and met regularly.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về những mục tiêu quan trọng mà bạn đã đạt được trong thời gian gần đây (đó là mục tiêu gì, bạn đã nỗ lực ra sao và kết quả đó có ý nghĩa thế nào với bạn).
writing_prompts.example: I have already achieved several important goals that I set for myself at the beginning of this year. I have completed a professional certification in project management and improved my fitness level significantly. I have also saved enough money to buy a new laptop for my work and studies.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về nơi bạn đang sinh sống (bạn đã ở đó bao lâu, những thay đổi gần đây ở khu phố của bạn và điều gì làm bạn thích nhất ở nơi này).
writing_prompts.example: I have lived in this vibrant city for five years and I have seen many positive changes in the neighborhood. The local government has built new parks and improved the public transportation system recently. I have made many good friends here and I feel very comfortable with my current life.

elementary.title: A2 Present perfect or past simple?
elementary.content:
📌 Sự khác biệt chính
Present PerfectPast Simple
Thời gianKhông quan trọng / Không rõ ràngQuan trọng / Đã xác định (last night, 2020)
Trạng tháiCòn liên quan đến hiện tạiĐã kết thúc hoàn toàn

exercises.q: A: I ___ to cinema. B: What ___ you ___?
exercises.opts: have been / did / see,went / have / seen,have been / have / seen,went / did / see

exercises.q: He ___ in NY for years. (He's there now)
He ___ in NY for years. (He's gone now)
How long ___ you ___? (You work there now)
How long ___ you ___? (You don't work there now)

I have just finished my lunch

passage.text: A: I {{1}} (see) Peter last night. B: I {{2}} (not/see) him since summer. A: {{3}} you {{4}} (see) film before? B: Yes, I {{5}} (see) it last night. A: What {{6}} (you/do) last weekend? B: I {{7}} (stay) home. A: {{8}} you {{9}} (meet) Tom in school? B: Yes, we {{10}} (be) friends since then.

I {{1}} (be) writer for years. I {{2}} (start) when I {{3}} (be) child. I {{4}} (write) first book in 2010. Since then, I {{5}} (publish) five books. Last year, I {{6}} (win) prize. I {{7}} (travel) a lot. I {{8}} (just/return) from Japan. I {{9}} (spend) two weeks there. It {{10}} (be) amazing.

Mark {{1}} (live) in Canada for five years. He {{2}} (move) in 2019. Before that, he {{3}} (live) in London. I {{4}} (not/see) him since he {{5}} (leave). We {{6}} (talk) many times. Last week, he {{7}} (call). He {{8}} (just/buy) house. He {{9}} (invite) me. I {{10}} (never/be) there.

A: {{1}} you ever {{2}} (eat) sushi? B: Yes, I {{3}} (eat) it many times. A: When {{4}} you first {{5}} (try) it? B: I {{6}} (try) it when I {{7}} (be) in Japan. I {{8}} (go) there three years ago. A: {{9}} you {{10}} (like) it? B: Yes, it was good.

I {{1}} (lose) wallet yesterday. I {{2}} (look) everywhere. I {{3}} (not/find) it yet. I {{4}} (go) to station this morning. They {{5}} (ask) questions. I {{6}} (be) worried. Someone {{7}} (just/call). They {{8}} (find) it in park. I {{9}} (be) happy. I {{10}} (not/be) lucky for long.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể chi tiết về kỳ nghỉ hè năm ngoái của bạn (điểm đến, những hoạt động chính, bạn đi cùng ai và tại sao đó lại là một kỷ niệm đáng nhớ).
writing_prompts.example: Last year, I went to Da Lat with my family for a week-long summer vacation to escape the heat. We visited many famous flower gardens, enjoyed the cool weather, and ate delicious local street food. It was a memorable trip because we spent a lot of quality time together and took many beautiful photos.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về trải nghiệm leo núi của bạn (ngọn núi nào, độ khó ra sao, thời tiết lúc đó thế nào và cảm giác khi bạn đứng trên đỉnh núi).
writing_prompts.example: I have climbed Fansipan twice in the last three years, and each time was a unique and challenging experience. The first time was quite difficult because of the heavy rain, but the second time was much better with clear skies. I have always loved the feeling of standing on the peak and looking at the clouds.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần bạn bị mất một món đồ quan trọng (mất khi nào, ở đâu, bạn đã làm gì để tìm lại và kết quả ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: I lost my expensive smartphone yesterday while I was commuting to work on a crowded bus. I realized it was gone when I reached the office and tried to call my colleague. I have already reported the loss to the police and the bus company, but I haven't found it yet.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết cảm nhận về một bộ phim bạn vừa mới xem xong (tên phim, nội dung chính, diễn xuất hoặc kỹ xảo có gì ấn tượng và bạn có muốn giới thiệu nó cho ai không).
writing_prompts.example: I have just watched a great movie called 'Inception' and I am still thinking about its complex plot and amazing visual effects. The acting was superb, and the story kept me interested from the beginning until the very end. I have already recommended it to all of my friends who love sci-fi films.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một lần tình cờ gặp lại người bạn cũ (gặp ở đâu, sau bao nhiêu năm, hai bạn đã trò chuyện về những gì và cảm xúc của bạn lúc đó).
writing_prompts.example: I met my old friend from high school last week while I was shopping at the mall near my house. We hadn't seen each other for nearly ten years, so we decided to have coffee and talk about our lives. It was wonderful to hear about his success and reminisce about our school days.
